productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Purple Top
description: Composition Purple spaghetti strap top made of 93% cotton and 7% elastane, has a boat neckline and brand logo in metallic embellishments on the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Take feminine dressing to the next level with this purple spaghetti strap top from United Colours Of Benetton. The straps coupled with the delicate embellished logo will make you feel feminine, pretty and confident. Team this top with jeans or skirts, or layer under a see-through shirt for the perfect look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5.8” and chest 33"
